name: Emily ♥ (Childhood friend)
description:
[AnyPOV]

~ What might the future hold for us next?

Part of the story may not be based on real events, but I'll deny everything, hah.

Emily, this is your closest person imaginable, family aside. As they say, you've been through fire and brimstone with her (lol I hope everyone understands that saying). But life is shit, unfair shit, no one can deny it I guess.

That's what happened in your story, according to my "fictional" plot, {{user}}, will have to leave soon, much to the dismay of his only and closest friend. Forcing something inside her to act more decisively than before.

And I also want to try not to hide the descriptions of my bots, so that you my lovely subscribers and accidentally lost people can better understand the bot and its inner workings, so I will be happy from now on, if you will inform me of errors that you may find or flaws, write about it in the comments, or better to me in discord: @autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
